nation: Stoney First Nation - Morley Health Centre
economic_notes: Entity is economically dependent on Health Canada funding. Defined contribution pension plan with employer matching 3.5%-7.5% of gross pay; total employer contributions 2024: $267,155.
notes: This is a standalone fund-level financial statement for the Morley Health Centre, a component of the broader Stoney First Nation reporting entity. Consolidated financial statements are prepared separately. The entity is not a full First Nation government. ISC-fixed deferred revenue of $353,971 remains at year-end. Large interentity advances net outflow of $1,180,327 during the year. Deferred revenue balance of $2,760,440 at year-end includes significant IELCC Mental Health carryforward of $738,038. Total government transfers calculated from deferred revenue schedule: revenue recognized from federal government $10,931,918 plus other recognized transfers $837,948 totalling $11,769,866; OSR is rental income $98,075 plus other income $837,948 = $936,023 (other income appears to be the recognized other deferred revenue, which overlaps; used total revenue minus federal government recognized amounts for OSR approximation). COVID-19 funding actual was nil in 2024 vs $320,340 in 2023.
